claims.fieldOrBehavior: Manifest id source-tree-validation. Source tree validation passed.
Manifest id static-eval-suite. 80/80 passed (2 skipped) + 43/43 passed, exit 0.
Manifest id anti-gaming-and-trust-suite. ANTI-GAMING SUITE PASSED (25 tests).

Manifest id goal-fit-hook-integration (run with env -u FLOW_AGENTS_GOAL_FIT_MODE -u FLOW_AGENTS_GOAL_FIT_RECHECK per instructions, to avoid this operator's ambient env). All CRITICAL-closure (iteration-2 item 1), negative-control, ambiguous-with-pass-claim (item 4), AC4/AC5, dialect-preservation, and mutation tests pass. Goal Fit hook integration passed.
Manifest id record-check-integration. AC6/AC7 + mutation tests green. record-check integration passed.

Manifest id workflow-sidecar-writer-integration. AC7 advisory + mutation tests green (rerun sequentially after an initial parallel-execution race with another suite corrupted the build output mid-run; a clean sequential rerun passed cleanly). Workflow sidecar writer integration passed.
Manifest id hook-category-behavior-integration. Hook category behavior checks passed.
Manifest id current-json-per-actor-integration. #345-exclusion regression guard. test_current_json_per_actor: all checks passed.
Manifest id workflow-steering-hook-integration. #345-exclusion regression guard. Workflow steering hook integration passed.

bash evals/run.sh integration (full run) exits 1 driven by exactly three pre-existing, unrelated-to-scope failure groups: test_goal_fit_escape_hatch.sh (5 issues), test_session_resume_roundtrip.sh (13 issues), and one ambient-env-only assertion inside test_goal_fit_hook.sh's default-mode case. Each was independently re-run against a freshly checked-out, unmodified origin/main (a974c1f) worktree (git worktree add --detach from origin/main, npm ci, npm run build) with byte-identical failure text and counts, confirming these are pre-existing baseline conditions, not regressions introduced by this delivery's 8 changed files. Zero new failures were observed anywhere in the full integration run beyond these three known groups; every manifest-listed integration script that touches #362 scope, plus both explicitly-named #345-exclusion regression guards, passed cleanly (see sibling checks). No command field: this is a triage/audit note over an already-executed non-manifest-listed combined run, not a fresh manifest-matched command re-execution.

git diff origin/main --stat -- . lists exactly 8 changed files: context/scripts/hooks/stop-goal-fit.js, evals/integration/test_goal_fit_hook.sh, evals/integration/test_record_check.sh, evals/integration/test_workflow_sidecar_writer.sh, scripts/hooks/evidence-capture.js, scripts/hooks/lib/runnable-command.js, scripts/hooks/stop-goal-fit.js, src/cli/workflow-sidecar.ts -- matching the plan's #362-only manifest exactly (3 pure-#362 files + stop-goal-fit.js and its context mirror + 3 eval files). git diff origin/main --stat against the named #345-only files (workflow-steering.js, config-protection.js, config-protection-remedies.js, current-pointer.js and their mirrors, test_current_json_per_actor.sh, test_workflow_steering_hook.sh) returns empty. A full-diff grep for resolveActorScope|hasOtherActorPointer|ownedSessionArtifactDirs|scopedToNothing across the entire diff returns zero matches. The one textually-entangled require() line in stop-goal-fit.js was confirmed split correctly: the current-pointer.js destructure is byte-identical to origin/main (still just readCurrentPointer, no hasOtherActorPointer/ownedSessionArtifactDirs added), while only the runnable-command.js destructure gained isAmbiguousAbsenceCommand. Full read-through of the stop-goal-fit.js diff confirms only #362 regions landed (classifyLogEntry, readCommandLog/readLatestCommandLog ambiguous threading, runBackstop tri-state classification + dialect-preservation invariant comments, captureCrossReference/capturedFailReconciliation ambiguous branches, HARD_BLOCK/FULL_BLOCK regex additions) with no resolveActorScope, no refactored preferredArtifactDir/staleCurrentSlug, and no analyze() scoping block. No command field: this is a diff/grep audit over the working tree, not a manifest-tracked reproducible command.

resolveTrustedCommand 'acceptance' branch: DIALECT-PRESERVATION INVARIANT comment, verbatim argv[2] replay

claims.fieldOrBehavior: diff scripts/hooks/stop-goal-fit.js context/scripts/hooks/stop-goal-fit.js is empty (exit 0) -- the context-kit mirror stays byte-identical after the iteration-2 fix.

Non-manifest aggregate command (bash evals/run.sh integration is a runner, not itself a manifest entry), folded to a non-command summary per reconcile-preflight's own guidance. Full run exits 1 (non-zero) driven by exactly 4 groups: test_goal_fit_hook.sh (1, ambient-env-only), test_goal_fit_escape_hatch.sh (5), test_session_resume_roundtrip.sh (13) -- all 3 confirmed byte-identical pre-existing on a clean origin/main a974c1f full-suite re-run performed during this same pass -- plus 1 additional non-reproducing flake in test_liveness_conflict_injection.sh (hostile-actor sanitization case) that did NOT reproduce in 3 isolated re-runs on this worktree, did not reproduce in an isolated re-run after the full sweep, and did NOT appear at all in the clean origin/main full-suite re-run; unrelated to any of the 8 #362 files (liveness/telemetry-hook machinery is untouched by this diff). Recorded pass because the full local eval gate has zero new failures attributable to this delivery; the flake is flagged for separate follow-up, not as a #362 regression.

Independent manual repro (terminal delivered status, ambiguous bare grep -E claimed-pass, evidence.json-only, no trust bundle, never captured, FLOW_AGENTS_GOAL_FIT_MODE=block): node scripts/hooks/stop-goal-fit.js exits 2, stderr contains '[stop-gate] Stop blocked' and the distinct 'NOT_VERIFIED (ambiguous): re-record this check as a self-asserting command' message, and never the caught-false-completion accusation. Confirms iteration-1 CRITICAL is closed in the common (non-bundle) code path, independent of the evals/integration/test_goal_fit_hook.sh fixtures.

Independent manual repro of the same terminal shape but with a self-asserting absence check (! grep -q ...) claimed pass: node scripts/hooks/stop-goal-fit.js exits 0 with empty stderr -- confirms the fix does not introduce a new over-block for legitimate self-asserting absence checks.

git diff --stat origin/main lists exactly the 8 expected #362 files (context/scripts/hooks/stop-goal-fit.js + mirror scripts/hooks/stop-goal-fit.js, scripts/hooks/evidence-capture.js, scripts/hooks/lib/runnable-command.js, src/cli/workflow-sidecar.ts, evals/integration/test_goal_fit_hook.sh, evals/integration/test_record_check.sh, evals/integration/test_workflow_sidecar_writer.sh); git status --porcelain shows no untracked/new files. No scope creep.

git diff origin/main | grep -nE 'resolveActorScope|hasOtherActorPointer|ownedSessionArtifactDirs|config-protection|assignment/' returns zero matches (grep exit 1) -- no #345 content present anywhere in the 8-file diff.

A bare (non-negated, non-count-asserted, non-chained) grep/diff evidence command that exits 1 (zero matches / no diff) is never treated as a caught false-completion by the trusted backstop (runBackstop) or by the command-log readers (readCommandLog/readLatestCommandLog); it classifies as 'ambiguous', distinct from 'fail', and is surfaced as a NOT_VERIFIED-style warning, never silently dropped and never coerced to pass.

Exit codes >= 2 for grep/diff (a real tool error, e.g. missing file/bad regex) remain a hard FAIL through the same code paths (runBackstop, readCommandLog/readLatestCommandLog, captureCrossReference, capturedFailReconciliation) — the ambiguity carve-out is exactly exitCode===1 for grep/diff and nothing wider; this is a regression guard on the pre-existing behavior, not new behavior.

src/cli/workflow-sidecar.ts recordCheck maps a bare grep/diff exit-1 re-run to the existing 'not_verified' check status (never a new enum value — consumes the existing workflow-acceptance.schema.json status enum, ADR 0008/0010 consume-never-fork) and emits a loud, actionable stderr note; recordCheck itself still exits 0 (the command ran; this is not a tool error).

validateAcceptanceEvidenceRefs (record-evidence path) emits a non-fatal, advisory stderr nudge when a newly- or already-recorded kind:"command" evidence ref's excerpt is a bare grep/diff invocation, recommending a self-asserting rewrite ('! grep ...' or 'grep -c ... | grep -qx 0'); the ref itself is never rejected or altered (back-compat with #412 already-recorded refs).

REQUIRED NEW WORK (gap found during this reshape, not yet implemented anywhere in the combined tree): the recorded command's exact flags/dialect must be preserved verbatim on trusted-backstop re-run so an ERE-recorded pattern (e.g. grep -E) is never silently re-run under BRE semantics. Current state: resolveTrustedCommand's 'acceptance' source already re-runs the recorded excerpt string verbatim via ['bash','-lc', fromAcceptance] (dialect is not corrupted on THAT path today), but there is no eval that pins this, no explicit dialect-preservation contract/comment, and the 'declared manifest target' and 'model-command' backstop sources (declaredManifestTarget, the FLOW_AGENTS_GOAL_FIT_RECHECK free-form path) construct their OWN argv rather than replaying a recorded string, so a future edit could silently reintroduce a re-derived/re-quoted command that drops -E/-P or otherwise changes dialect without any test catching it. Required: (1) a source comment on resolveTrustedCommand's 'acceptance' branch stating the verbatim-replay invariant explicitly (grep/diff dialect flags are part of the recorded command text and MUST NOT be stripped, re-derived, or re-quoted), (2) a regression eval that records a grep -E (ERE) evidence ref containing an ERE-only construct (e.g. an alternation `(foo|bar)` without escaping) and asserts the backstop re-run still matches (i.e. is not silently downgraded to BRE, which would either false-fail on a real match or misbehave on the metacharacters).

context/scripts/hooks/stop-goal-fit.js (the context-kit mirror) is byte-identical to scripts/hooks/stop-goal-fit.js after the #362-only hunks are applied, since the #362 changes to stop-goal-fit.js are part of the #362 shippable manifest and this file is mirrored today.

The #362 branch/diff contains none of the #345-only symbols or files: resolveActorScope, hasOtherActorPointer, ownedSessionArtifactDirs, actorScopedWorkflowState's ownership-scan branch, scripts/hooks/workflow-steering.js (+ its context mirror), scripts/hooks/config-protection.js (+ mirror), scripts/hooks/lib/config-protection-remedies.js (+ mirror), scripts/hooks/lib/current-pointer.js, evals/integration/test_current_json_per_actor.sh, evals/integration/test_workflow_steering_hook.sh.

The full local eval gate (static + integration, at minimum the five touched integration files: test_goal_fit_hook.sh, test_record_check.sh, test_workflow_sidecar_writer.sh, plus the untouched-by-#362 test_current_json_per_actor.sh and test_workflow_steering_hook.sh as regression guards) passes on the #362-only branch cut from origin/main tip.

CRITICAL: ambiguous claimed-pass (bare grep/diff exit 1) does not HARD_BLOCK a TERMINAL stop in the common config (evidence.json-only, or never-captured live-backstop-only). Terminal-block-on-ambiguous only wired for the captured+bundle third bucket which emits NOT_VERIFIED (ambiguous); captureCrossReference/runBackstop emit plain NOT_VERIFIED — that only FULL_BLOCK (non-terminal) matches. Reproduced 3x in strict block mode, exit 0 no block; exit>=2 control still blocks correctly. NOT a #345 relocation (scope grep clean). Fix: unify the (ambiguous) marker across all emission sites so HARD_BLOCK+FULL_BLOCK match in all configs; add 3-config terminal eval coverage + self-asserting negative control.

APPROVE with findings (recorded as fail to gate the fix pass): MEDIUM dialect invariant comment overclaims byte-for-byte-exactly-as-recorded (upstream normalizeCommand whitespace-collapses first) - rescope comment. LOW dialect evals lack mutation-test wrapper siblings have. LOW remediation message string duplicated across 5 sites - single-source it. Split integrity itself confirmed CLEAN.

RESOLVED in iteration 2: marker unified across all 3 ambiguous emission sites; security re-review independently reproduced all 3 terminal configs now HARD_BLOCK + self-asserting negative control still passes (no over-block) + scope clean. CRITICAL closed.
RESOLVED in iteration 2: dialect comment rescoped, dialect eval mutation-test added, remediation message single-sourced. Code re-review CLEAN, all 3 prior non-blockers confirmed resolved.
